sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107330" key="u(perbi/aios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερβίαιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107330.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extremely violent,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐξολκή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.26</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
